name: epistemic-cooperative
description: Use $epistemic-cooperative:onboard and related utilities for protocol learning and analysis.

interface.shortDescription: Use $epistemic-cooperative:onboard and related utilities for protocol learning and analysis.
interface.longDescription: Use $epistemic-cooperative:onboard and related utilities for protocol learning and analysis.
defaultPrompt: Use $epistemic-cooperative:onboard to recommend the right protocol for me.
Use $epistemic-cooperative:catalog to compare protocols by use case.
Use $epistemic-cooperative:report to analyze recent session patterns.
